regions.text: The start of a circle depends on how big it will be. (Illustration: Curves of different sizes).
There is feed-forward as well as feed-back. Feed-back only works if you have a direction (feed-forward) for what you are trying to do.
You might not know your direction yet; you may be searching for it.
Just as microscopes helped us see better, improved 'instruments of thought' help us design, direct, and understand our own actions. unless: if not.
